titleStmt.title: SII 10.548: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 548. (A.R. No. 261 of 1905.) ON A NANDI PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE DARK ROOM (CHń™KAŠĻ¨I-MIDDI) IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURńÄNTAKńíŇöVARA, TRIPURńÄNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ňö. 1[2]5[7](?) (Yuva)

summary.p: States that PŇćtiraŠłćŠłći TallayaraŠłćŠłći presented 100 cows and one bull to the temple of TripurńĀntaka-MahńĀdńďva for the merit of his masters AmbadńďvarńĀja and LŇćkinńĀyaka, sons of ChelinńĀyani Komma-NńĀyaka, lord of RńďvanŇęru. A long string of Komma-NńĀyaka's birudas is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
